subcodes.first_line: O my God and my Hope! This servant hath turned with supplication unto the kingdom of Thy mercy and the dominion of Thy oneness, yearning for Thy good-pleasure [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی و رجائی هذا عبد قد تضرع الی ملکوت رحمانیتک و جبروت فردانیتک متمنیا رضاک
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @spiritual transformation, @consolation and comfort
